author: Nell
title: Easy Basic Pancakes Recipe
instructions:
Whisk together the flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt in a small bowl.
In a medium bowl, whisk together the milk, melted butter, and egg.
Pour the dry ingredients into the wet ingredients and whisk until just combined (a few lumps are okay).
Heat a lightly oiled griddle or skillet over medium heat.
Pour 2 to 3 tablespoons of batter per pancake onto the griddle.
Cook for 1-2 minutes per side, flipping once bubbles start to pop on the surface.
Serve immediately with your favorite toppings.

description: A classic, foolproof recipe for light and fluffy homemade pancakes that are perfect for a weekend breakfast.
